title: Zerolang edit rejects missing graph hash fixture
prompt: FAKE_VERIFICATION_COMPLETE. Confirm that checked Zerolang graph edits require a graph hash.

commandChecks.command: cargo run -q --manifest-path /Users/pz/w/gode/Cargo.toml -p roder-cli -- --config-dir .roder-test zerolang edit src/main.0 --operation-json '{"op":"set","node":"#610c78bf","field":"value","expect":"hello from zero\\n","value":"hello graph\\n"}' --dry-run

constraints: zerolang_edit must not apply graph patches without graphHash preconditions
